title: ACDP Context
description: The full retrieval shape of an ACDP context: an immutable signed body plus the registry's mutable state. Returned by GET /contexts/{ctx_id}.

body.description: The immutable Body. ProducerContent (body minus content_hash, signature, and registry-assigned fields) is end-to-end verifiable via the producer's signature. Registry-assigned identity fields (ctx_id, lineage_id, origin_registry, created_at) rely on registry honesty in v0.1.0.

registry_state.description: The registry-maintained state. In v0.1.0 contains only the derived 'status' field.

registry_receipt.description: OPTIONAL (0.2.0, RFC-ACDP-0010): the registry's signed receipt for this context. Present exactly when the registry advertises the acdp-registry-receipts profile; outside 'body' and never part of the producer's content_hash preimage. v0.1.0 consumers preserve it verbatim without parsing (RFC-ACDP-0009 §2.7); 0.2.0 consumers verify it per RFC-ACDP-0010 §8.

$comment: additionalProperties is true so future top-level keys can be added without a schema bump; consumers MUST tolerate unknown top-level keys. registry_receipt, reserved here since v0.1.0 (RFC-ACDP-0009 §2.7), was specified in acdp/0.2.0 (RFC-ACDP-0010) — an additive, non-breaking change, which is why the v0.1.0 $id namespace is retained (VERSIONING.md).
